title: boehmeria cylindrica subvar. phyllostachya
intro: Boehmeria cylindrica subvar. phyllostachya, also known as False nettle or Japanese Boehmeria, is a type of plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Boehmeria cylindrica subvar. phyllostachya include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
